<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 150; 50; 200; 950; 2500
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 300; 100; 650; 1800; 3250
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Faster Reloading; Precise Aiming; Stronger Equipment; Akimbo Handguns
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 3278746120; 3278749117; 3278741672; 3279537687
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 1.108 || 12 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 0.808 || 12 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.808 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 0.708 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 0.358 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.908 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 0.908 || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 0.758 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.508 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 14 || 0.308 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
​
